description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional couch with a left-facing chaise, upholstered in a smooth, solid gray fabric. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, giving the couch a streamlined and minimalist appearance. The armrests are gently curved and rise to the same height as the backrest, providing a cohesive silhouette. The legs are short, slightly tapered, and made of dark wood, elevating the couch just above the floor. The upholstery appears to be tightly fitted, with no visible tufting, patterns, or accent pillows. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional couch with a left-facing chaise, integrated cushions, and dark wooden legs. The design is minimalist and streamlined, with smooth upholstery and gently curved armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shape, left-facing chaise, and both armrests with integrated seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the chaise and the continuous height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unbroken backrest and the full width of the couch.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the depth of the chaise and the smooth transition between the seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One continuous seat cushion and one continuous back cushion, both integrated and non-removable, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, tightly fitted surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, slightly tapered legs made of dark wood, positioned at the corners and providing minimal elevation.
attribute_armrest_design: Gently curved armrests that rise to the same height as the backrest, with a smooth, continuous surface and no additional padding or ornamentation.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest integrated with the frame, non-tufted and smoothly upholstered.
